title: eleusine indica var. tristachya
intro: Eleusine indica var. tristachya, also known as finger grass or blue sprang-tide, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eleusine indica var. tristachya include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
